**Workflow**: Documentation

**Conclusion**: failure
**Timestamp**: 2026-04-21_21-20-13
**Commit**: fix: correct Rust edition from invalid 2024 to 2021

CRITICAL FIX: The Cargo.toml had edition = '2024' which is invalid!

Valid Rust editions are only: 2015, 2018, 2021
This was causing ALL CI runs to fail because cargo couldn't parse Cargo.toml.

Changed to edition = '2021' (latest stable Rust edition).

This fix should resolve all CI pipeline failures.
